meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Claude Code Debugging: Advanced Guide for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your debugging workflow and ship production-ready code as a student.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, integrate Claude Code into your terminal to analyze stack traces in real-time. Pair this with Antigravity to generate context-aware test suites. This combination transforms your terminal into an autonomous engineering station, allowing you to identify, isolate, and patch errors before they break your build pipeline.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with a wall of red text—a cryptic stack trace that feels like a brick wall between you and your project's completion. You’ve spent hours chasing ghost variables, and the frustration is real. This is the moment where most students stall out, but for the elite AI builder, this is merely a data processing challenge.

We are moving beyond manual print-debugging. By leveraging Claude Code’s deep architectural understanding and Antigravity’s ability to map logical flow, you can turn your terminal into a precision diagnostic tool. It is time to stop guessing and start engineering solutions with the speed of a senior developer.

steps.title: Initialize the Diagnostic Environment
steps.description: Establish a baseline by indexing your repository to allow the AI to understand your project structure before analyzing errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory structure and identify potential bottleneck files or modules that could be causing runtime instability.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Feed the specific error output into Claude Code to map the stack trace back to the source code definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the logic flow for the function identified in the stack trace and suggest three possible edge cases that could trigger this failure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "analyze the error in [file_path] and explain the root cause"

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to create a robust test case that replicates the bug, ensuring you can verify the fix programmatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite using Jest that specifically targets the logic error found in the previous step, ensuring the test fails initially.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create a reproduction test file for the identified bug"

steps.title: Refactor with Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Apply a targeted fix that addresses the root cause while maintaining architectural integrity across the repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the proposed fix for side effects in related modules and ensure compliance with existing design patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "apply the fix to [file_path] and verify against the new test case"

steps.title: Validate and Finalize
steps.description: Run the full test suite to ensure the fix is persistent and no regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final code review of the changes and suggest performance optimizations for the corrected logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "run all tests and confirm resolution"

pro_tips: Always use the --verbose flag in Claude Code when dealing with complex asynchronous bugs to see the thought chain.
Map your project's dependency graph in Antigravity before starting a deep debug session to prevent 'whack-a-mole' issues.
Treat your error logs as data; feed them into a local markdown file before prompting to maintain context across multiple sessions.
Use Claude Code's 'commit' feature only after confirming the fix with an automated test, never manually.
Create a 'debugging.md' file in your root to track recurrent issues; feed this to Claude Code whenever you start a new session.
resources: Effective Prompt Engineering for Code: https://anthropic.com/news
content.next_steps: Once your first bug is squashed, begin implementing an automated CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to integrate these Claude Code scripts into your push cycle.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical arsenal to dismantle any bug that stands in your way. Stop settling for trial-and-error and start building with architectural precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
